title: Candidates - June 2, 2026, Consolidated Statewide Direct Primary Election
text:
Candidates - June 2, 2026, Consolidated Statewide Direct Primary Election | SF.gov Skip to main content
REPORT
Candidates - June 2, 2026, Consolidated Statewide Direct Primary Election
Tuesday, June 2, 2026
Department of Elections
Certified list of candidates from the California Secretary of State
Board of Supervisors Chinese-character-based Names and Ballot Designations List
Board of Education and Superior Court Judge Chinese-character-based Names and Ballot Designations List
San Francisco Superior Court Letter Regarding Judicial Incumbents
Other Local Offices Chinese-character-based Names and Ballot Designations List - coming soon
Candidates are listed as “pending” until they have completed, and filed, all nomination documents and have paid the filing fee, if applicable. Once these documents are filed and the filing fee has been paid, the qualification status is changed to “qualified”. Candidate lists become final after the nomination deadline for each office.
This list was last updated on 3/27/2026.

Superior Court Judge, Seat 16
The incumbent for this seat did not file a Declaration of Intention with the Department. As such, the Declaration of Intention filing period for this seat will extend to 2/9/2026 at 5 p.m. (per California Elections Code §8023).
